summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the two-tab B2B Catalog ordering feature. All 21 backend API tests passed (POST /api/catalog/order/our-catalog for JSON, POST /api/catalog/order/print for multipart PDF, GET /api/catalog/orders). All frontend tests passed: /foretag page has two tabs ('Vår produktkatalog' and 'Skriv ut er katalog'), Tab 1 shows catalog type cards (Fysisk/Digital) with conditional address fields, Tab 2 shows PDF upload area with always-visible address fields, both tabs share company/contact form and submit correctly with appropriate success messages. Admin /admin/catalogs shows 40 orders with working filter buttons (Alla/Vår katalog/Utskrift).
critical_code_review_comments: catalog.py: Two separate endpoints correctly implemented - /order/our-catalog (JSON) and /order/print (multipart)
catalog.py: order_type field correctly set to 'our_catalog' or 'print' for filtering
catalog.py: PDF validation correctly rejects non-PDF files with Swedish error message
BusinessCatalog.js: Two-tab structure with correct data-testid attributes for testing
BusinessCatalog.js: Conditional address fields - hidden for digital, shown for physical and print
BusinessCatalog.js: Quantity controls with max 5 for our catalog, unlimited for print
BusinessCatalog.js: Success messages correctly differentiate between digital (24h email) and physical/print (5-7 days)
AdminCatalogs.js: Filter buttons correctly filter by order_type with fallback to catalog_type/pdf_url
AdminCatalogs.js: PDF download buttons correctly link to backend uploads
seed_data_creation: Created test catalog orders during testing (TEST_ prefixed companies for both our_catalog and print types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-tab B2B Catalog feature fully tested. OLD endpoint POST /api/catalog/order no longer exists - replaced by two new endpoints: POST /api/catalog/order/our-catalog (JSON body with catalog_type physical/digital) and POST /api/catalog/order/print (multipart form with pdf_file). GET /api/catalog/orders returns all orders with order_type field ('our_catalog' or 'print'). Frontend /foretag has tabs with data-testid: tab-our-catalog, tab-print-catalog. Admin /admin/catalogs has filter buttons: filter-all, filter-our, filter-print. Old test files (test_catalog_orders.py, test_catalog_pdf_upload.py) test outdated endpoints - use test_catalog_two_tabs.py for current implementation.

Backend POST /api/catalog/order/our-cata.Physical catalog order: ✓ Creates order with address fields, catalog_type='physical'

Backend POST /api/catalog/order/print (M.PDF file upload: ✓ Creates order with order_type='print', saves PDF

Frontend /foretag page.Tab 1 - Catalog type cards: ✓ Fysisk and Digital cards with selection
Frontend /foretag page.Tab 2 - PDF upload area: ✓ Upload area with preview and remove button
Frontend /foretag page.Tab 2 - Address always visible: ✓ Address fields always shown for print
